The '''Daggerstar''', also known as the '''swoop racer''', was a [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] model designed by [[Lhosan Industries]] and later began to be manufactured by [[Kakkran]]. The Daggerstar was originally produced in the [[Lower City]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Taris/Legends|Taris]]. Due to the planet's widespread love for [[Swoop racing/Legends|swoop racing]], the Daggerstar became very popular and was purchased in large quantities.

==Characteristics==
Although the Daggerstar had a cockpit similar to that of a landspeeder, its light construction, narrow chassis design and single-pilot capacity qualified it as a [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bike]]. It was incredibly fast, but not nearly as maneuverable as most other speeder bikes, such as the [[AeroChaser speeder bike]], also produced by [[Lhosan Industries]]. At high speeds the vehicle was sluggish if the pilot attempted to make more than minor course corrections, and the swoop had a larger turn radius than most repulsorlift vehicles. The swoop racer's ability to reach incredible speeds made it a popular racing craft, but the lack of maneuverability limited it to the races on a straight track with a few obstacles in the path.<ref name="KOTORCG" />

==History==
One such swoop was used by [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] to win the [[Tarisian Season Opener]].<ref>''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]'' established this vehicle as the swoop from the [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic|''Knights of the Old Republic'']] game.</ref> Another was owned by [[Davik Kang]], who kept it on his ship, the ''[[Ebon Hawk]]''. When [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] stole the ship with the help of [[Canderous Ordo]], he found the swoop bike inside and later used to participate in racing on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] and [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan]].<ref name="KOTOR" /> [[Kakkran]] was still producing the swoop under the name Daggerstar centuries later, during the [[Galactic War]] with the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]].
